user.title: Perfectly Snug Smart Topper
user.description: Enter the IP addresses of your Smart Topper zones. For a dual-zone topper, enter both IPs. For a single-zone (Twin), enter the left IP and check 'Single Zone'.

data.right_ip: Right Zone IP Address (dual zone only)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to topper at this IP. Make sure it's powered on and connected to WiFi.

init.title: Perfectly Snug Options
init.description: The topper's built-in ambient sensor reads 5-10°F higher than actual room temperature. Specify an external room temperature sensor for accurate ambient data ({room_temp_hint}).
